questionHtml: The magnitude of the net force on q is given by 32kQqD3x. Explain why the charge q will execute simple harmonic oscillations about C.
markschemeHtml:
The restoring force/acceleration is opposite to the displacement/towards equilibrium / OWTTE ✓

and proportional to displacement from equilibrium / OWTTE✓

Allow discussions based on the diagram (such as towards C for towards equilibrium).

Accept F ∝ x OR a ∝ x for MP2

meta.title: The magnitude of the net force on q is given by 32kQqD3x. Explain why the charge q will execute simple harmonic oscillations about C.
